query: glitch art pixel sorting digital corruption datamoshing
message: sub:digital_artifacts/glitch — anti_aesthetic — pixel sorting, color shifts, datamosh, digital corruption

response.objective_caption: Multiple translucent cyan-blue rectangular panels containing small thumbnail images and interface graphics are suspended in three-dimensional space against a solid black background, crisscrossed by elongated diagonal cyan lines and beams of light that intersect the layered forms.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract digital composition where translucent cyan interface panels are intentionally repeated and ghosted through digital artifacts, rendered with deliberate motion blur and streaking light trails that fragment the subjects into layered, semi-transparent forms, abandoning representational clarity in favor of purely formal qualities of color, line, and depth.
